title: Dna Fun Remaster
description: Combine creatures dna together and watch out for the danger in day and night
body:
There an cool syringe in this mod that enables you to collect DNA from different creatures and there three machines called Dna Injector/Dna Fusion/Dna Egg. Within the Dna Injector your enables to inject the DNA out of the syringe and with the Dna Fusion you can combine the DNA you collected from the syringes and with the Dna Egg enbles you to add the dna you just created in a normal chicken egg.

So grab your syringe and go into the dangerous world full with the horror of mystery, Beware of the corrupted mods that seek for you in the day and night.
